description: Grid-aligned Worley F2-F1 with sharp step thresholds produces trace lines and pads reminiscent of a printed circuit board. Manhattan distance metric for orthogonal traces, Chebyshev for rectangular pads.

base.comment: Manhattan distance gives orthogonal trace lines

modifiers.comment: Chebyshev F1 produces square pads at cell centres
Tiny manufacturing imperfection warp — keeps it feeling physical

example_prompts: create a circuit board pattern with trace lines and square pads
make a PCB-style texture using Worley cells and sharp thresholds

screenshot_metadata.notes: Render at 1024x1024. Use dark green (#0a1f0a) background with bright circuit-board green (#00ff41) traces and copper-gold (#b87333) pads. Hard-edge shading, no anti-aliasing on thresholds.
